The .gov means it's official.
Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Department of State
Pennsylvania Department of State
Welcome to Pennsylvania Department of State's website.
Information for voters
Overview
The Department protects the public's health and safety by licensing more than one million business and health professionals; promotes the integrity of the electoral process; supports economic development through corporate registrations and transactions; maintains registration and financial information for thousands of charities, and sanctions professional boxing, kick-boxing, wrestling and mixed martial arts.

Programs & Services
Explore all of the Department's services
Register a Business
Learn about forming and registering your business online, and how to complete other types of business filings.
Start your business
Register a Charity
If you are raising money in Pennsylvania for a charity, learn about registering your organization with us.
Register today
Apply for or Renew Your Professional License
If your job requires a professional or occupational license to work in Pennsylvania, you can apply for or renew online.
Apply or renew today
Apply to be a Notary
If you're looking to become a notary in Pennsylvania, or to renew your commission, you can start your application here.
Apply today
Voting & Elections
Find information about the electoral process as well as Campaign Finance, Voter Registration, and more about voting.
Learn more about the voting
